name: revit_import_export
description: Imports or exports the active document using supported Revit interchange formats.

operation.description: Whether to import into or export from the document

format.description: Format key matching MainData options (e.g. dwg, dwf, gbxml, image, fbx)

view_id.description: View element id when the format requires a view

options.description: Format-specific options object (layer mapping, image size, etc.)

notes: Map each MainForm/MainData handler to a headless function; large surface area across formats.
